title: Canva Poster Mission
description: A spy mission to make an original poster in Canva!

scenes.speech: Poster Agent! Make one poster in Canva! 🖼️
scenes.title: Mission: Poster Op
scenes.content: Mission: finish an original poster using Canva. Three conditions: pick one message to convey, use one photo, work at A4 size.

scenes.speech: Canva is a friend to beginners!
scenes.title: What's Canva?
scenes.content: Canva is full of templates. Browser or app, drag and drop to design easily.
scenes.highlight:
Canva strengths:
- Many templates
- Browser OK
- Free assets

scenes.speech: Decide the theme in one sentence!
scenes.title: Theme
scenes.content: 'A poster about reading', 'School fest poster' — say who it's for and what message in one line.
scenes.highlight:
Theme shape:
For whom + what message

scenes.title: Pick Template
scenes.content: Search 'poster' for many templates. Pick one near your vibe; just change text and colors for speed.
scenes.highlight:
Pick by:
- Vibe
- Text length
- Color

scenes.title: Op: Headline
scenes.content: Posters are read in 3 seconds. The biggest text = your message. Keep it under 10 words for impact.
scenes.highlight:
Headline rule:
- Big
- Under 10 words
- Stand-out color

scenes.title: Visuals
scenes.content: Canva has millions of free assets. One on-theme photo or illustration shapes the whole feeling.
scenes.highlight:
Visual choice:
- On theme
- Just one
- Keep whitespace

scenes.speech: Print it for a real copy!
scenes.title: Download & Print
scenes.content: Top-right Download saves as PDF or JPG. Printing and sticking it up gives a different satisfaction than digital.

scenes.speech: Mission complete! Submit the image for 400 points 🚀
scenes.title: Mission Complete!
scenes.content: Done means a viewer 'gets it' in 3 seconds. Show one person and check if they understand the message.
